chunks.title: Judgment on Shepherds and Promise of Restoration
chunks.reason: A unified oracle addressing the corrupt leaders with a promise of future restoration and the coming Messiah.

chunks.title: Jeremiah's Distress over False Prophets
chunks.reason: A personal speech describing the prophet's emotional state and specific accusations against false prophets in Samaria and Jerusalem.

chunks.title: Contrast of True and False Prophets
chunks.reason: An argumentative section distinguishing between the false prophets' self-derived visions and the true council of Yahweh.

chunks.title: Yahweh's Omnipresence and Word Compared to Dreams
chunks.reason: An oracle using rhetorical questions about God's presence and metaphors of fire and hammer to contrast His word with human dreams.

chunks.title: Judgment on Stealing Words and Lying Dreams
chunks.reason: A specific oracle condemning prophets who steal words from one another or recount lying dreams.

chunks.title: Warning Against the Phrase Oracle of Yahweh
chunks.reason: A concluding exhortation warning the people and priests against misusing the title 'oracle of Yahweh' as a cliché.
